content: حَطّ كْريم حَامِيَة مِن الشَّمْس، دي حَاجَة ضَرُورِيَة جِدّاً
translations: eng:put on sun protection cream, this is essential

transcriptions.arabizi: hattakreem hamya min ilshams, di haega daroorya giddaen
